verse_text: whom He poured out on us abundantly through Jesus Christ our Savior,

links.context: Our salvation and calling are based on His grace and love, not on anything we have done to merit God's favor ([[EPH.2:8]]-10; [[TIT.3:5]], [[TIT.3:6]]).

Adoption as a child of God is not a matter of ethnic descent (of blood) as it was in the OT; nor are we children of God simply by natural birth (the will of the flesh), nor by man's own decision (the will of man). Becoming a child of God is a spiritual birth by grace, through faith, and in the Holy Spirit. This is accomplished and manifested in the sacrament of Holy Baptism (3:5-8; see [[TIT.3:4]]-7).
